
:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="45%"}

**Instructor**

[{{< fa volume-high >}}](audio/instructor.mp3){aria-label="Play audio pronunciation of professor name"} {{< var instructor.name >}}   
{{< var instructor.pronoun >}}
[{{< var instructor.email >}}](mailto:{{< var instructor.email >}}){aria-label="Email the instructor"}
<img src="img/instructor.jpeg" class="rounded-circle center mx-auto d-block"
     alt="A headshot of a woman with curly, short, ear-length hair with green eyes and red lipstick."
     style="float: left; margin-right: 10px; width: 100%; padding-bottom:20px;" />
     

Office Hours: <br> {{< var instructor.office-hours >}} 

{{< fa building-columns title="Office Location" >}} {{< var instructor.office >}}  
[{{< fa video >}}  Zoom]({{< var instructor.zoom >}}){aria-label="Join Zoom meeting with the prof"}


:::

::: {.column width="5%"}

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

**Teaching Assistant (TA)**

[{{< fa volume-high >}}](audio/ta.mp3){aria-label="Play audio pronunciation of TA name"} {{< var ta.name >}}   
{{< var ta.pronoun >}}
[{{< var ta.email >}}](mailto:{{< var ta.email >}}){aria-label="Email the TA"}

<img src="img/ta.jpeg" class="rounded-circle center mx-auto d-block"
     alt="A headshot of a man wearing a navy blue jacket"
     style="float: left; margin-right: 10px; width: 100%; padding-bottom:20px;" />
     

Office Hours: <br> {{< var ta.office-hours >}} 

{{< fa building-columns title="Office Location" >}} {{< var ta.office >}}  
[{{< fa video >}}  Zoom]({{< var ta.zoom >}}){aria-label="Join Zoom meeting with the TA"}



:::



::::
